display.purpose: Hub h1 only. Amber-gold with glow. One instance on the site.

headline.purpose: Game page h1. Game accent color with matching glow. Game name only.

label.purpose: Score box labels (SCORE, HIGH, LEVEL). Uppercase by content, not CSS.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Hub game cards on hover only. Paired with translateY(-5px). Never on resting surfaces.

shadows.name: heading-glow-gold
shadows.purpose: text-shadow on hub h1. Follows amber-gold accent, not layout.

shadows.name: heading-glow-accent
shadows.purpose: text-shadow on game page h1. Use the game accent's RGB values. Same formula as heading-glow-gold.

motion.name: snappy
motion.purpose: Hover state changes: nav link opacity, button opacity+scale. The fastest tier.

motion.name: card-hover
motion.purpose: Card lift: transform, box-shadow, border-color toggled together.

components.name: Game Card
components.description: Hub navigation card. Per-game accent injected via --accent CSS custom property.
components.html:
🐍

Snake

Eat food, grow longer, and don't hit the walls or yourself!

Play
components.css: .ds-game-card { background: #16213e; border: 1px solid #0f3460; border-radius: 14px; padding: 28px 20px 20px; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; color: #eee; transition: transform 0.15s ease-out, box-shadow 0.15s ease-out, border-color 0.15s ease-out; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-game-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); border-color: var(--accent); } .ds-game-card__icon { font-size: 3.2rem; line-height: 1; } .ds-game-card__title { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 1.05rem; font-weight: 700; color: #eee; margin: 0; } .ds-game-card__desc { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.78rem; color: #999; line-height: 1.45; flex: 1; margin: 0; } .ds-game-card__play { margin-top: 10px; padding: 6px 22px; border-radius: 99px; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.03em; }

components.name: Play Button
components.description: Pill-shaped play button inside a hub card. Inherits game accent from --accent.
components.css: .ds-play-btn { display: inline-block; padding: 6px 22px; border-radius: 99px; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.03em; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.1s ease-out, transform 0.1s ease-out; } .ds-play-btn:hover { opacity: 0.9; transform: scale(1.04); }

components.name: Restart Button
components.description: In-game restart/start button rendered in the canvas overlay.
components.css: .ds-restart-btn { background: var(--accent, #e67e22); color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 28px; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.1s ease-out, transform 0.1s ease-out; } .ds-restart-btn:hover { opacity: 0.9; transform: scale(1.04); } .ds-restart-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #e67e22); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Score Box
components.description: Game UI readout. Dark surface with uppercase tracking label and large value in game accent.
components.css: .ds-score-box { background: #16213e; border: 1px solid #0f3460; border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 16px; text-align: center; min-width: 80px; } .ds-score-box__label { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.625rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; color: #aaa; } .ds-score-box__value { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.35rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--accent, #f9ca24); }

components.name: Back Navigation
components.description: Single text link returning to the hub. Amber-gold at 80% opacity, full opacity on hover.
components.css: .ds-back-nav { width: 100%; max-width: 420px; } .ds-back-nav__link { color: #f9ca24; text-decoration: none; font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; opacity: 0.8; transition: opacity 0.1s ease-out; } .ds-back-nav__link:hover { opacity: 1; } .ds-back-nav__link:focus-visible { outline: 1px solid #f9ca24; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Game Canvas Wrapper
components.description: The structural wrapper around every game canvas. Hosts the start/end overlay.
components.html:
Snake

Use arrow keys to move
components.css: .ds-canvas-wrap { position: relative; } .ds-canvas-wrap canvas { display: block; border: 2px solid #0f3460; border-radius: 4px; background: #0d1117; } .ds-canvas-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(10,10,20,0.9); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 14px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-canvas-overlay.hidden { display: none; } .ds-canvas-overlay__title { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.8rem; font-weight: 700; } .ds-canvas-overlay__sub { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #aaa; text-align: center; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview:
This is a place someone made, not a product that was launched. The Game Hub has a quiet, focused energy — deep space navy surfaces, a warm amber-gold glow on the things that matter, and enough restraint that each game gets its own identity when you step into it. The hub defers to the games. The games defer to the player.

The system is built on a committed dark strategy: the navy palette spans three depth layers (page, surface, canvas), separated not by shadows but by tonally distinct blues. Color appears only where it earns its place. Motion is quiet at rest and snappy on interaction.
keyCharacteristics: Three-layer dark depth (page → surface → canvas) via tonal navy, not shadows
Amber-gold as the single shared hub accent; each game gets its own distinct accent
System-ui typography — legible, neutral, never competes with the games
Hover interactions snappy at 0.1–0.15s, physical-feeling (lift + shadow)
No decorative elements — layout, color, and motion only

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Amber-gold (#f9ca24) is the hub's voice. On game pages, the game accent takes over entirely. The two should never compete.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: Depth is expressed through tonal navy layers (#1a1a2e → #16213e → #0d1117), not shadows. Do not invent new depth layers.

rules.name: The Flat-by-Default Rule
rules.body: Resting surfaces have no box-shadow. Shadows appear only as a response to hover interaction.

rules.name: The Glow Rule
rules.body: Headings in an accent color always pair with a matching glow (text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(r,g,b,0.4)). The glow follows the accent, not the layout.

rules.name: The Accent Injection Pattern
rules.body: Per-game color is injected via style='--accent:#hex' on the card or page root. One component; five visual identities; no per-game CSS classes.

dos: Do use amber-gold only on the hub page and navigation links. On game pages, the game accent takes its place.
Do inject per-game color via style="--accent:#hex" on the card or page root.
Do apply glow text-shadow whenever a heading uses an accent color: text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(r,g,b,0.4).
Do use the three tonal navy layers as the depth system — tone, not shadow.
Do keep hover transitions at 0.1–0.15s. Immediate and physical, not animated.
donts: Don't use AI slop patterns: cream backgrounds, pastel card grids, gradient text, glassmorphism, hero metrics, numbered section eyebrows.
Don't use cheap mobile-ad game aesthetics: flashing banners, gradient overload, fake progress bars, aggressive CTAs.
Don't use dark gamer cliché: neon-on-black aggression, purple-cyan neon schemes, toxic visual energy.
Don't use kids' site design: chunky primary colors, cartoon mascots, patronizing copy.
Don't add box-shadow to resting surfaces.
Don't use border-left or border-right as a colored stripe accent.
Don't introduce new accent colors outside the defined set.
Don't use text-transform: uppercase in CSS. Uppercase labels are uppercase by content.
